name: Youhanna Maher
title: Power Platform Developer
subtitle: I help businesses automate repetitive workflows and build efficient Power Platform systems that streamline operations and improve data visibility.
about: As a dual-degree management student ranked first in my class at both Ain Shams University and the University of Poitiers, I offer a unique combination of business logic and technical execution.

I focus on solving real-world problems. Whether it's replacing a messy Excel file with a robust app or automating an approval process that used to take days, my goal is to build systems that are efficient, reliable, and easy to use.
With experience managing systems for over 15,000 users, I understand how to build for scale while keeping the user experience simple and effective.

expertise.title: Power Apps
expertise.desc: Custom business applications, role-based workflows, operational systems, and internal tools designed for high usability and scale.

expertise.title: Power Automate
expertise.desc: End-to-end process automation, complex approval flows, notification triggers, and integrated logic across enterprise apps.

expertise.title: Power BI
expertise.desc: Dynamic reporting, KPI dashboards, operational analytics, data visualization, and real-time operational insights.

expertise.title: SharePoint & Dataverse
expertise.desc: Structured and relational enterprise data structuring, application backends, and robust document-linked workflows.

expertise.title: Excel & Power Query
expertise.desc: Advanced data cleaning, pipeline integration, macro automation, and operational process support.

expertise.title: Business Analysis
expertise.desc: Deep process mapping and requirement analysis to translate operational barriers into effective digital architectures.
